Free & Open Source

Your AI Code Agent

OpenJunior is a free, open-source AI code assistant that helps you write, refactor, and understand code. Powered by OpenCode, it runs on your machine — no data leaves your computer.

Download Source Code
Available for
🍎 macOS 🪟 Windows 🐧 Linux
openjunior — bash
$

Get the latest version for your platform. Free forever.

What's New

Latest changes and improvements in the most recent release.

Changelog
View all releases →

Everything you need for AI-powered development

OpenJunior combines the power of OpenCode with a beautiful, native desktop experience.

AI-Powered

Powered by OpenCode. Get context-aware code completions, refactoring suggestions, and bug fixes in real time.

Desktop + Web + VS Code

Use OpenJunior as a desktop app, in your browser, or directly inside VS Code. Same experience everywhere.

Built-in Terminal

Full PTY terminal with SSH tunnel management. Run commands, preview outputs, and let AI help debug.

Visual Git Tool

Review diffs, stage changes, commit, push, manage branches, and create PRs — all from the AI chat.

Privacy First

OpenJunior runs on your machine. Your code never leaves your computer. No telemetry, no tracking.

Customizable

Configure MCP servers, integrate with your favorite tools, and extend OpenJunior with plugins.

Ready to supercharge your coding?

Download OpenJunior free and open-source. No sign-up required.

Download Now

Your AI Code Agent — Free & Open Source
